metadata.task_name: UI primitives task-10 existing baseline integration specification
metadata.scope: Integrate task-10 UI primitive contract with current apps/web/src/components/ui baseline without deleting existing exports.

phases.name: テストカバレッジ確認

acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Existing apps/web/src/components/ui/index.ts exports are not removed.
AC-2: The task-10 11 primitive contract is importable from @/components/ui.
AC-3: Button, Avatar, Field, Input, and Select keep backward-compatible props.
AC-4: Card, Badge, Sidebar, Stat, EmptyState, and Banner are added or aliased.
AC-5: Existing Chip, Switch, Segmented, Textarea, Search, Drawer, Modal, Toast, KVList, and LinkPills remain exported.
AC-6: UI primitive classes use OKLch token utilities or project CSS variables only.
AC-7: lucide-react is the icon source; new hand-rolled icon components are not introduced.
AC-8: Smoke and accessibility tests cover the primitive contract.
AC-9: typecheck, test, build:cloudflare, coverage, and token grep gates pass.
AC-10: Phase 12 strict 7 files and aiworkflow-requirements sync are completed.
